arts.ttl: Athletic Bilbao vs Man United LIVE: Visitors out to spoil Europa League dream and save season
arts.sum: Athletic Bilbao are looking to reach the Europa League final at home and host the semi-final first leg

arts.ttl: Athletic Club vs Man United Combined XI: Casemiro joins Fernandes in Europa League side
arts.sum: Manchester United travel to the Basque Country for the second time this season as they look to protect their unbeaten European campaign when they take on Athletic Club in their Europa League semi-fina...

arts.ttl: Into the Lions' den - spiritual San Mames awaits Man Utd
arts.sum: Manchester United face Athletic Club on Thursday at San Mames, the unique and iconic Bilbao venue that will also host the Europa League final.

arts.ttl: How to watch Athletic Bilbao vs Man Utd: TV channel and Europa League semi-final kick-off time
arts.sum: Manchester United hope to end a sorry run of road form by gaining the upper hand over Athletic Bilbao when they visit Spain for the first leg of their Europa League semi-final

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim fires Man Utd warning over Athletic Bilbao but explains how they can win
arts.sum: Manchester United left it late to come from behind against Lyon in the Europa League quarter-finals and now face another big challenge against Athletic Bilbao in the semis

arts.ttl: Ruben Amorim admits Man United's season CANNOT be saved ahead of crunch Europa League semi-final clash with Athletic Bilbao
arts.sum: CHRIS WHEELER IN BILBAO: United take on Athletic Bilbao in the semi-final at the Estadio San Mames hoping to return to the same venue for the final later this month.

arts.ttl: Why Chido Obi-Martin has been named in Man Utd squad vs Bilbao despite Europa League ban
arts.sum: Manchester United confirmed the squad that would be travelling to Spain for their Europa League clash with Athletic Bilbao and there were a few surprise names included by Ruben Amorim

arts.ttl: Nico Williams injury update: Will in-demand Athletic Bilbao superstar face Man United?
arts.sum: Athletic Bilbao attacker Nico Williams says that he is "feeling pretty good" about his troublesome groin injury.

arts.ttl: Man Utd receive huge double injury boost as squad named for Athletic Bilbao trip
arts.sum: Manchester United head coach Ruben Amorim has named a big travelling squad for the first leg of the Europa League semi-final against Athletic Club on Thursday night

arts.ttl: Amad Diallo and Matthijs de Ligt travel with Man Utd for Athletic Bilbao clash
arts.sum: The pair trained at Carrington on Wednesday morning and were part of the 26-man squad that travelled to Spain.
